   122→/// An enum to represent what operation to do on
   123→pub enum KvOperation<'a, S: serde::Serialize + Debug> {
   124→    Hset((&'a str, String), TypedSql),
   125→    SetNx(&'a S, TypedSql),
   126→    HSetNx(&'a str, &'a S, TypedSql),
   127→    HGet(&'a str),
   128→    Get,
   129→    Scan(&'a str),
   130→}

   132→#[derive(TryGetEnumVariant)]
   133→#[error(RedisError::UnknownResult)]
   134→pub enum KvResult<T: de::DeserializeOwned> {
   135→    HGet(T),
   136→    Get(T),
   137→    Hset(()),
   138→    SetNx(redis_interface::SetnxReply),
   139→    HSetNx(redis_interface::HsetnxReply),
   140→    Scan(Vec<T>),
   141→}
   142→
   143→impl<T> std::fmt::Display for KvOperation<'_, T>
   144→where
   145→    T: serde::Serialize + Debug,
   146→{
   147→    fn fmt(&self, f: &mut std::fmt::Formatter<'_>) -> std::fmt::Result {
   148→        match self {
   149→            KvOperation::Hset(_, _) => f.write_str("Hset"),
   150→            KvOperation::SetNx(_, _) => f.write_str("Setnx"),
   151→            KvOperation::HSetNx(_, _, _) => f.write_str("HSetNx"),
   152→            KvOperation::HGet(_) => f.write_str("Hget"),
   153→            KvOperation::Get => f.write_str("Get"),
   154→            KvOperation::Scan(_) => f.write_str("Scan"),
   155→        }
   156→    }
   157→}
   158→
   159→pub async fn kv_wrapper<'a, T, D, S>(
   160→    store: &KVRouterStore<D>,
   161→    op: KvOperation<'a, S>,
   162→    partition_key: PartitionKey<'a>,
   163→) -> CustomResult<KvResult<T>, RedisError>
   164→where
   165→    T: de::DeserializeOwned,
   166→    D: crate::database::store::DatabaseStore,
   167→    S: serde::Serialize + Debug + KvStorePartition + UniqueConstraints + Sync,
   168→{
   169→    let redis_conn = store.get_redis_conn()?;
   170→
   171→    let key = format!("{}", partition_key);
   172→
   173→    let type_name = std::any::type_name::<T>();
   174→    let operation = op.to_string();
   175→
   176→    let ttl = store.ttl_for_kv;
   177→
   178→    let result = async {
   179→        match op {
   180→            KvOperation::Hset(value, sql) => {
   181→                logger::debug!(kv_operation= %operation, value = ?value);
   182→
   183→                redis_conn
   184→                    .set_hash_fields(&key.into(), value, Some(ttl.into()))
   185→                    .await?;
   186→
   187→                store
   188→                    .push_to_drainer_stream::<S>(sql, partition_key)
   189→                    .await?;
   190→
   191→                Ok(KvResult::Hset(()))
   192→            }
   193→
   194→            KvOperation::HGet(field) => {
   195→                let result = redis_conn
   196→                    .get_hash_field_and_deserialize(&key.into(), field, type_name)
   197→                    .await?;
   198→                Ok(KvResult::HGet(result))
   199→            }
   200→
   201→            KvOperation::Scan(pattern) => {
   202→                let result: Vec<T> = redis_conn
   203→                    .hscan_and_deserialize(&key.into(), pattern, None)
   204→                    .await
   205→                    .and_then(|result| {
   206→                        if result.is_empty() {
   207→                            Err(report!(RedisError::NotFound))
   208→                        } else {
   209→                            Ok(result)
   210→                        }
   211→                    })?;
   212→                Ok(KvResult::Scan(result))
   213→            }
   214→
   215→            KvOperation::HSetNx(field, value, sql) => {
   216→                logger::debug!(kv_operation= %operation, value = ?value);
   217→
   218→                value.check_for_constraints(&redis_conn).await?;
   219→
   220→                let result = redis_conn
   221→                    .serialize_and_set_hash_field_if_not_exist(&key.into(), field, value, Some(ttl))
   222→                    .await?;
   223→
   224→                if matches!(result, redis_interface::HsetnxReply::KeySet) {
   225→                    store
   226→                        .push_to_drainer_stream::<S>(sql, partition_key)
   227→                        .await?;
   228→                    Ok(KvResult::HSetNx(result))
   229→                } else {
   230→                    Err(report!(RedisError::SetNxFailed))
   231→                }
   232→            }
   233→
   234→            KvOperation::SetNx(value, sql) => {
   235→                logger::debug!(kv_operation= %operation, value = ?value);
   236→
   237→                let result = redis_conn
   238→                    .serialize_and_set_key_if_not_exist(&key.into(), value, Some(ttl.into()))
   239→                    .await?;
   240→
   241→                value.check_for_constraints(&redis_conn).await?;
   242→
   243→                if matches!(result, redis_interface::SetnxReply::KeySet) {
   244→                    store
   245→                        .push_to_drainer_stream::<S>(sql, partition_key)
   246→                        .await?;
   247→                    Ok(KvResult::SetNx(result))
   248→                } else {
   249→                    Err(report!(RedisError::SetNxFailed))
   250→                }
   251→            }
   252→
   253→            KvOperation::Get => {
   254→                let result = redis_conn
   255→                    .get_and_deserialize_key(&key.into(), type_name)
   256→                    .await?;
   257→                Ok(KvResult::Get(result))
   258→            }
   259→        }
   260→    };
   261→
   262→    let attributes = router_env::metric_attributes!(("operation", operation.clone()));
   263→    result
   264→        .await
   265→        .inspect(|_| {
   266→            logger::debug!(kv_operation= %operation, status="success");
   267→            metrics::KV_OPERATION_SUCCESSFUL.add(1, attributes);
   268→        })
   269→        .inspect_err(|err| {
   270→            logger::error!(kv_operation = %operation, status="error", error = ?err);
   271→            metrics::KV_OPERATION_FAILED.add(1, attributes);
   272→        })
   273→}

   275→pub enum Op<'a> {
   276→    Insert,
   277→    Update(PartitionKey<'a>, &'a str, Option<&'a str>),
   278→    Find,
   279→}
   280→
   281→impl std::fmt::Display for Op<'_> {
   282→    fn fmt(&self, f: &mut std::fmt::Formatter<'_>) -> std::fmt::Result {
   283→        match self {
   284→            Op::Insert => f.write_str("insert"),
   285→            Op::Find => f.write_str("find"),
   286→            Op::Update(p_key, _, updated_by) => {
   287→                f.write_str(&format!("update_{} for updated_by_{:?}", p_key, updated_by))
   288→            }
   289→        }
   290→    }
   291→}
   292→
   293→pub async fn decide_storage_scheme<T, D>(
   294→    store: &KVRouterStore<T>,
   295→    storage_scheme: MerchantStorageScheme,
   296→    operation: Op<'_>,
   297→) -> MerchantStorageScheme
   298→where
   299→    D: de::DeserializeOwned
   300→        + serde::Serialize
   301→        + Debug
   302→        + KvStorePartition
   303→        + UniqueConstraints
   304→        + Sync,
   305→    T: crate::database::store::DatabaseStore,
   306→{
   307→    if store.soft_kill_mode {
   308→        let ops = operation.to_string();
   309→        let updated_scheme = match operation {
   310→            Op::Insert => MerchantStorageScheme::PostgresOnly,
   311→            Op::Find => MerchantStorageScheme::RedisKv,
   312→            Op::Update(_, _, Some("postgres_only")) => MerchantStorageScheme::PostgresOnly,
   313→            Op::Update(partition_key, field, Some(_updated_by)) => {
   314→                match Box::pin(kv_wrapper::<D, _, _>(
   315→                    store,
   316→                    KvOperation::<D>::HGet(field),
   317→                    partition_key,
   318→                ))
   319→                .await
   320→                {
   321→                    Ok(_) => {
   322→                        metrics::KV_SOFT_KILL_ACTIVE_UPDATE.add(1, &[]);
   323→                        MerchantStorageScheme::RedisKv
   324→                    }
   325→                    Err(_) => MerchantStorageScheme::PostgresOnly,
   326→                }
   327→            }
   328→
   329→            Op::Update(_, _, None) => MerchantStorageScheme::PostgresOnly,
   330→        };
   331→
   332→        let type_name = std::any::type_name::<D>();
   333→        logger::info!(soft_kill_mode = "decide_storage_scheme", decided_scheme = %updated_scheme, configured_scheme = %storage_scheme,entity = %type_name, operation = %ops);
   334→
   335→        updated_scheme
   336→    } else {
   337→        storage_scheme
   338→    }
   339→}
